text:
There once was a girl named Polly. Polly was very curious. Every day she would learn something new.

One day Polly visited the library. There were thousands of books about animals.

She picked up a book about giraffes.


Polly read the book until she fell asleep.


That night a big elephant sat next to Polly.


Feeling scared Polly ran away.

Later she returned home.

That night a hippo sat next to Polly.


Feeling brave Polly hugged the hippo.

Suddenly the hippo kicked Polly backwards.


Polly fell into darkness.

The next day Polly woke up.

There was an elephant next to her.

They hugged.



That night an anteater sat next to Polly.


Feeling brave Polly hugged the anteater.


Suddenly the anteater kicked Polly.


Polly fell downwards.

Suddenly a flamingo saved Polly.


The flamingo lifted Polly upward.

Together they flew away.




That night an owl hooted.

Suddenly a giant owl swooped down.


The owl captured Polly.
